title: Weedol Tough Weed Control 1L Spray / 3L RTU / 5L Power Sprayer | Ready to Use Garden Weed Killer for Deep-Rooted Weeds | No Glyphosate Formula (1L RTU)
features: Fast-acting weed killer formulated for tough and deep-rooted weeds – ideal for brambles, nettles, thistles, docks, and other stubborn invaders.
Visible results within 24 hours – acts quickly to kill unwanted growth above and below the surface.
Non-glyphosate formula for peace of mind – ideal for use in family gardens, around sheds, fences, driveways, and patios.
Pre-mixed and ready to use – no measuring or mixing required – simply spray and let it work.
Systemic action targets leaves and roots – helps prevent regrowth and delivers long-lasting results.
Rainfast within 1 hour of application – continues working even after light showers.
Use on paths, gravel, beds, patios, and waste ground – versatile treatment for general outdoor weed control.
Available in 1L spray bottle, 3L RTU sprayer, and 5L power sprayer – choose the format that suits your garden size and usage frequency.
description: Weedol Tough Weed Control is a ready-to-use weed killer specially developed for deep-rooted and hard-to-kill weeds. It works fast to tackle brambles, nettles, thistles, and docks, delivering results you can see in as little as 24 hours. Its systemic formula penetrates deep into the plant, attacking from the leaves right down to the roots to ensure lasting control. The product is rainproof within 1 hour and can be used safely on patios, gravel paths, borders, fences, and driveways. Available in multiple formats to suit gardens of all sizes. Variation 1: 1L RTU Size Name: 1L Description: Convenient 1L ready-to-use trigger spray for targeted spot treatment or smaller garden areas. Variation 2: 3L RTU Size Name: 3L Description: Larger 3L ready-to-use container ideal for treating medium to large outdoor spaces. Comes with an integrated sprayer. Variation 3: 5L Power Sprayer Size Name: 5L Power Sprayer Description: High-capacity 5L pack with battery-powered spray system – perfect for frequent or large-scale weed control tasks. Ingredients (Shared): Contains acetic acid and other non-glyphosate weed control agents Directions (Shared): Apply directly to actively growing weeds in dry weather. Spray thoroughly until leaves are fully wet but avoid run-off. Do not use on lawns or near edible crops. For best results, apply during full leaf growth in spring or summer.
